changed_construction_audit.plain_language_claim: The label was a redundant internal child container inside a possible TopicComment analysis. It never survived complete output and contributed no independent Cantonese grammar claim beyond comment-role metadata already carried by TopicComment.

sources.citation: Canto Span CP021B-R34 internal disposition matrix
Canto Span CP034 low-reference wrapper audit

unresolved_questions: The independent linguistic boundaries of Cantonese topic-comment structure remain under TopicComment research and are not settled by this internal cleanup.

changed_construction_audit.plain_language_claim: The label was a lexical-item-specific 解決咗 wrapper that complete parsing always consumed as PerfectiveVP. The mapped sources support separating lexical result meaning from perfective aspect but do not establish this dedicated productive node.

sources.citation: Fan, Xiaolei and Kin Wing Kevin Chan. 2022. Grammatical properties of zo 咗 in Hong Kong Cantonese.
sources.locator: Language and Linguistics 23(3):374 and article discussion

sources.citation: Kędzior, Adrian. 2023. Verbal Morphological Category of Aspect in the Cantonese Language.
Canto Span CP036 and CP041 constructor/output audits

unresolved_questions: Result-state and perfective composition boundaries remain governed by the retained source-linked constructions and future native-panel evidence; retirement does not settle their productivity.

implementation_validation: PASS required before handoff: exact complete-output equivalence to the v0.5.196 base tree over 1,885 structured candidates, 545 regression cases, 43 NP cases, 1,221 construction assertions, 166 note/test alignment, zero uncovered labels, historical wrapper audits, panel workflow, promotion and release gates, documentation links, and full repository verification.
linguistic_confidence: No retained construction gained evidence or status. Comment was retired as a redundant internal role wrapper. PerfectiveResultPredicate was retired as a shadowed lexical-item-specific wrapper while its two source records remain preserved. No survey result was integrated.
overclaim_review_scope: Compared the exact v0.5.196 and v0.5.197 complete diagnostic rows across the frozen 1,885 structured-candidate set, inspected both constructors and their prior source/disposition records, and retired only labels that added no observable final span or independent supported boundary.
unresolved_release_questions: The remaining implementation-only and compatibility-alias-only labels still require pattern-specific linguistic evidence before promotion.
RUL and PFV survey integration remains paused while collection proceeds.
When native-panel evidence becomes blocking again, the survey-guidance prompt must be requested before drafting or revising the instrument.
